name: dex-claude-marketplace
description: Маркетплейс AI-агентов для разработчиков. Атомарные плагины с узкой специализацией: Skills (знания), Specialists (агенты), Bundles (наборы).

plugins.name: dex-skill-agile
plugins.description: Agile fundamentals: Epic/Story/Task hierarchy, INVEST, DoR/DoD, sizing, sprints

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-ef-core
plugins.description: Entity Framework Core: queries, tracking, migrations, performance optimization, owned-type mapping

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-async-patterns
plugins.description: Async/await patterns: cancellation, parallelism, ValueTask, best practices

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-linq-optimization
plugins.description: LINQ optimization: deferred execution, materialization, performance

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-api-development
plugins.description: API development: REST, versioning, URL design, error handling, DTOs

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-validation
plugins.description: Server-side input validation: FluentValidation rules, baseline field rules, polymorphic fail-fast

plugins.name: dex-skill-api-documentation
plugins.description: API documentation: OpenAPI/Swagger, XML comments, examples

plugins.name: dex-skill-api-specification
plugins.description: API specification: OpenAPI/Swagger design, contracts, versioning

plugins.name: dex-skill-api-testing
plugins.description: API testing: REST validation, status codes, response verification

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-testing-patterns
plugins.description: Testing patterns: xUnit, Moq, Arrange-Act-Assert, test organization

plugins.name: dex-skill-test-design
plugins.description: Test design: equivalence partitioning, boundary analysis, test cases

plugins.name: dex-skill-owasp-security
plugins.description: OWASP security: auth bypass, IDOR, injection, XSS, CSRF, privilege escalation, pre-auth invariants

plugins.name: dex-skill-git-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflow: branching, conventional commits, code review, merge requests

plugins.name: dex-skill-merge-conflict-resolution
plugins.description: Разрешение конфликтов merge/rebase без тихой потери стороны: семантические конфликты, ours/theirs в rebase, modify/delete как переезд, lock-файлы, миграции, evil merge.

plugins.name: dex-skill-review-step-by-step
plugins.description: Code review — пошаговое ревью с разбором каждого пункта через апрув.

plugins.name: dex-skill-react
plugins.description: React patterns: hooks, components, state management, performance, TypeScript

plugins.name: dex-skill-playwright
plugins.description: Playwright E2E traps: locators, auto-waiting, isolation, network mocking, traces, fixtures

plugins.name: dex-skill-ts-patterns
plugins.description: TypeScript traps: typing, async/await, runtime vs compile-time pitfalls

plugins.name: dex-skill-ts-vitest-jest
plugins.description: Vitest/Jest unit testing traps: mock hoisting, fake timers, async assertions, isolation

plugins.name: dex-skill-ts-nodejs-api
plugins.description: Node.js API traps: Express/Fastify/Hono, middleware, error handling, validation

plugins.name: dex-skill-rabbitmq
plugins.description: RabbitMQ patterns: exchanges, queues, MassTransit, dead-letter

plugins.name: dex-skill-kafka
plugins.description: Kafka patterns: producers, consumers, partitioning, exactly-once

plugins.name: dex-skill-elasticsearch
plugins.description: Elasticsearch patterns: indexing, searching, aggregations, NEST

plugins.name: dex-skill-redis
plugins.description: Redis patterns: caching, pub/sub, data structures, StackExchange.Redis

plugins.name: dex-skill-mongodb
plugins.description: MongoDB patterns: documents, queries, indexes, aggregation

plugins.name: dex-skill-docker
plugins.description: Docker patterns: multi-stage builds, security, compose, optimization

plugins.name: dex-skill-kubernetes
plugins.description: Kubernetes patterns: deployments, services, HPA, probes, Helm

plugins.name: dex-skill-gitlab-ci
plugins.description: GitLab CI/CD: pipelines, jobs, artifacts, environments

plugins.name: dex-skill-teamcity
plugins.description: TeamCity CI/CD: build configurations, pipelines, artifacts

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-logging
plugins.description: Logging patterns: Serilog, structured logging, correlation, Seq, content-level level selection, exception wrapping for optional steps

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-csproj-hygiene
plugins.description: MSBuild csproj hygiene: PackageReference, CPM, Directory.Build.props, PrivateAssets, analyzers

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-caching
plugins.description: .NET caching: HybridCache, IMemoryCache, stampede, tag invalidation, negative caching

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-code-quality
plugins.description: Гигиена .NET: Roslyn analyzers, warning-профиль, NuGet security audit, контроль зависимостей через NSDepCop

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-project-baseline
plugins.description: Технический baseline нового .NET проекта: наследование правил solution vs закладка с нуля, мягкое предупреждение о недостающей гигиене

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-resilience
plugins.description: HTTP client resilience: Polly, retry, circuit breaker, timeouts, idempotency

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-config-hygiene
plugins.description: .NET configuration hygiene: appsettings, IOptions, environment-specific settings, validation

plugins.name: dex-skill-observability
plugins.description: Observability: OpenTelemetry, metrics, tracing, health checks

plugins.name: dex-skill-nfr
plugins.description: Non-functional requirements traps: numeric NFRs, SLA/SLO/SLI, p99 latency, security NFR (data classification, authorization model, secrets management, audit log, IDOR, multi-tenant)

plugins.name: dex-skill-capacity-planning
plugins.description: Capacity planning traps: peak vs average load, write amplification, back-of-envelope estimation, read:write ratio, cache cost asymmetry, denormalization, hot path identification

plugins.name: dex-skill-scalability
plugins.description: Scalability traps: premature horizontal scaling, stateful services (memory, fs, connections), shared mutable state, sharding key selection (hot partition, hash mod N, multi-tenant, cross-shard)

plugins.name: dex-skill-cap-consistency
plugins.description: CAP theorem and consistency trade-offs: strong vs eventual, PACELC, per-operation choice, read-your-writes, quorum, split-brain, clock skew, saga compensation + PACELC defaults cheatsheet for typical storages

plugins.name: dex-skill-tech-evaluation
plugins.description: Technology evaluation traps: hype-driven adoption, no PoC, ignoring operational cost, vendor lock-in, deprecation risk, license traps, hidden cost, team expertise

plugins.name: dex-skill-reference-architectures
plugins.description: Reference architecture selection traps: feed (push vs pull), chat (WebSocket/SSE/long-poll), payment (idempotency + outbox + saga), search (split paths), notifications (fan-out tail vs head), rate-limiter algorithms

plugins.name: dex-skill-distributed-resilience
plugins.description: Distributed systems resilience: concurrency (CAS, optimistic locking, lost update) and reliability (timeout, retry, idempotency, circuit breaker, graceful degradation, bulkheads, health checks)

plugins.name: dex-skill-clean-architecture
plugins.description: Clean Architecture: layers, dependencies, domain-centric design, CQRS contracts

plugins.name: dex-skill-codebase-conventions
plugins.description: Project conventions vs technical decision — what to copy from siblings: form, naming, layer signature, placement, integration

plugins.name: dex-skill-ddd
plugins.description: Domain-Driven Design: aggregates, entities, value objects, bounded contexts, ubiquitous language, persisted state vs computed

plugins.name: dex-skill-microservices
plugins.description: Microservices: decomposition, communication, data management, resilience

plugins.name: dex-skill-user-stories
plugins.description: User stories: format, acceptance criteria, Given-When-Then, INVEST

plugins.name: dex-skill-bpmn
plugins.description: BPMN modeling: process flows, gateways, events, swimlanes

plugins.name: dex-skill-doc-standards
plugins.description: Documentation standards: BRD, PRD, ADR, User Stories, Tech Specs

plugins.name: dex-skill-epic-planning
plugins.description: Epic planning: decomposition, scope, dependencies, release planning

plugins.name: dex-skill-product-discovery
plugins.description: Product discovery: research, validation, opportunity assessment

plugins.name: dex-skill-prioritization
plugins.description: Prioritization: RICE, MoSCoW, value vs effort, scoring models

plugins.name: dex-skill-python-pytorch
plugins.description: PyTorch patterns: models, training, data loading, GPU optimization

plugins.name: dex-skill-python-tensorflow
plugins.description: TensorFlow/Keras: models, layers, callbacks, distributed training

plugins.name: dex-skill-python-classical-ml
plugins.description: Classical ML: scikit-learn, XGBoost, feature engineering

plugins.name: dex-skill-python-nlp-transformers
plugins.description: NLP Transformers: HuggingFace, BERT, fine-tuning, tokenization

plugins.name: dex-skill-python-computer-vision
plugins.description: Computer Vision: CNNs, classification, detection, augmentation

plugins.name: dex-skill-python-ml-optimization
plugins.description: ML optimization: hyperparameters, Optuna, Ray Tune, MLflow

plugins.name: dex-telegram-notifier
plugins.description: Telegram notifications for Claude Code events: task completion, waiting, subagents

plugins.name: dex-discord-notifier
plugins.description: Discord уведомления о событиях Claude Code: завершение задач (Stop), ожидание ответа (Notification), завершение субагентов (SubagentStop), compact контекста (PostCompact). Включает информацию о TODO, последнем сообщении, используемых инструментах и планах.

plugins.name: dex-dotnet-coder
plugins.description: Coding assistant for .NET: writing code, SOLID patterns, async/await

plugins.name: dex-dotnet-quality-auditor
plugins.description: Аудит гигиены качества .NET-проекта: анализаторы, warning-профиль, NuGet audit, NSDepCop, CI-gates — отчёт «есть / нет / настроить».

plugins.description: Grafana monitoring specialist: dashboards, alerts, metrics

plugins.name: dex-architect
plugins.description: Interactive system design architect: интервью, capacity, reference architectures (feed/chat/payment), deep dive, implementation plan. Стек-нейтральный

plugins.name: dex-architect-dotnet
plugins.description: Interactive architect for .NET: интервью, capacity, reference architectures, deep dive под ASP.NET Core / EF Core / MassTransit / Polly

plugins.description: Bundle for TypeScript fullstack: Node.js/Bun backend + React frontend, security, Docker, Playwright E2E

plugins.description: Complete infrastructure: databases, messaging, containers, CI/CD, monitoring

plugins.description: CLI tools bundle: VCS/CI (gh, glab, jenkins, teamcity), Kubernetes (kubectl), data & messaging (psql, redis-cli, kaf, rabbitmqadmin), cloud (aws s3), browser testing (playwright)

plugins.name: dex-gitlab-cli
plugins.description: GitLab CLI: pipelines, merge requests, job logs via glab

plugins.name: dex-github-cli
plugins.description: GitHub CLI: workflow runs, pull requests, Actions logs via gh

plugins.name: dex-kubectl-cli
plugins.description: Kubernetes CLI: pods, logs, deployments, events, contexts via kubectl

plugins.name: dex-teamcity-cli
plugins.description: TeamCity CLI: runs, agents, build logs via teamcity (JetBrains official Go CLI)

plugins.name: dex-jenkins-cli
plugins.description: Jenkins CLI: jobs, builds, console output via jenkins-cli.jar

plugins.name: dex-psql-cli
plugins.description: PostgreSQL CLI: read-only queries, schema inspection, EXPLAIN plans, locks via psql

plugins.name: dex-redis-cli
plugins.description: Redis CLI: server info, key scanning, memory analysis, real-time sampling via redis-cli

plugins.name: dex-kaf-cli
plugins.description: Kafka CLI: topics, consumer groups, message tail, test produce via kaf

plugins.name: dex-rabbitmqadmin-cli
plugins.description: RabbitMQ CLI: cluster overview, queues, bindings, test publish via rabbitmqadmin-ng

plugins.name: dex-aws-s3-cli
plugins.description: AWS S3 CLI: list buckets/objects, bucket info, object metadata, presigned URLs via aws s3

plugins.name: dex-playwright-cli
plugins.description: Playwright CLI: run tests, show HTML report, codegen recorder, trace viewer, browser install via npx playwright

plugins.name: dex-skill-github-actions
plugins.description: GitHub Actions CI/CD: workflow traps, security, caching, matrix builds

plugins.name: dex-skill-jenkins
plugins.description: Jenkins CI/CD: Jenkinsfile traps, shared libraries, credentials, pipelines

plugins.name: dex-cicd-github
plugins.description: GitHub Actions CI/CD specialist: workflows, matrix builds, deployments

plugins.name: dex-cicd-jenkins
plugins.description: Jenkins CI/CD specialist: Jenkinsfile, declarative pipelines, shared libraries

plugins.name: dex-skill-deep-audit
plugins.description: Deep audit: concurrency, error handling, security, data access traps

plugins.name: dex-skill-tech-audit
plugins.description: Tech audit: approach evaluation, component analysis, risk assessment

plugins.name: dex-mcp-inspector
plugins.description: MCP Inspector: test and debug MCP servers interactively

plugins.name: dex-codebase-analyzer
plugins.description: Codebase analysis utility: scc summary, repomix pack, ast-grep dependency graph with graceful fallback. Used by architect agents in Codebase Priming

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-di
plugins.description: .NET Dependency Injection: lifetime, Service Locator, registration traps

plugins.name: dex-skill-solid
plugins.description: SOLID principles: SRP, OCP, LSP, ISP, DIP, predicate-naming violation traps

plugins.name: dex-skill-stack-registry
plugins.description: Канонический реестр стеков и правило загрузки skills по стеку×теме для общих агентов

plugins.name: dex-skill-dotnet-resources
plugins.description: .NET resources and memory: IDisposable, leaks, allocations, GC

plugins.name: dex-skill-testability
plugins.description: Code testability: hidden dependencies, determinism, test doubles

plugins.name: dex-knowledge-extractor
plugins.description: Pipeline извлечения уроков из чужих MR/PR в маркетплейс: /mr-collect собирает review-комментарии, /mr-analyze обобщает в предложения для skills/agents, /mr-apply применяет с self-review и валидацией.

plugins.name: dex-skill-no-loose-ends
plugins.description: Незавершённый код и скрытые хаки в продовой ветке: TODO/FIXME, заглушки, mock в проде, silent fallback, debug-вывод, hardcoded secrets, отключённые тесты, форк версии зависимости, спекулятивный код, дубль утилиты.

plugins.name: dex-skill-review-evidence
plugins.description: Дисциплина доказательств в ревью: не утверждать без чтения файла, доказывать отсутствие поиском, трассировать путь вход-эффект, фальсифицировать каждую находку, рубрики severity и confidence, порог публикации.

plugins.name: dex-skill-review-threads
plugins.description: Инлайн-доставка ревью: один тред на находку, привязка к строке через нативный API gh/glab, severity в первой строке, overview без дублирования тредов, протокол resolve, чужие треды не трогать.

plugins.name: dex-skill-output-hygiene
plugins.description: Гигиена вывода без LLM-маркеров: без эмодзи и длинных тире, без мета-фраз и хвалебных заголовков, без filler-вступлений, конкретика вместо абстракции, прямой ответ без пересказа запроса.

plugins.name: dex-skill-karpathy-guidelines
plugins.description: Дисциплина изменений по мотивам Karpathy: думать до кода и выносить допущения, простота вперёд, хирургические правки без лишнего рефакторинга, цель через проверяемые критерии, test-first для багов. Adapted from multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills (MIT).

plugins.name: dex-skill-managed-debug
plugins.description: Runtime .NET debug: netcoredbg, dotnet diagnostic tools, SOS, managed dumps, GC heap analysis, async stack

plugins.name: dex-skill-native-debug
plugins.description: Native CLI debug: GDB batch / MI2, LLDB scripting, ptrace, debuginfod, valgrind для memory leak и race detection

plugins.name: dex-skill-syscall-tracing
plugins.description: Linux syscall и event tracing: strace, bpftrace JSON output, bcc-tools (execsnoop/opensnoop/funclatency/memleak)

plugins.name: dex-skill-perf-profiling
plugins.description: Linux sampling-профилирование: perf record/script, FlameGraph, on-CPU vs off-CPU, JIT-символы для .NET

plugins.name: dex-skill-core-dumps
plugins.description: Post-mortem анализ coredump: gcore, coredumpctl, kernel.core_pattern, dotnet-dump analyze, mismatched libs, контейнеры

plugins.name: dex-skill-binary-inspection
plugins.description: Бинарный анализ - binutils (readelf, nm, objdump, addr2line, strings, ldd), Rizin JSON, LIEF Python API, ilspycmd для .NET

plugins.name: dex-dotnet-runtime-diagnostician
plugins.description: Runtime-диагностика .NET и native-симптомов: hang, crash, leak, slowdown, post-mortem через netcoredbg, gdb/lldb, perf, bpftrace, dotnet-dump

plugins.name: dex-netcoredbg-cli
plugins.description: Samsung netcoredbg CLI: attach, launch, MI2 batch, dump managed stacks для .NET runtime-диагностики

plugins.name: dex-bundle-runtime-diagnostics
plugins.description: Bundle для runtime-диагностики .NET и native-границы: специалист-диагностик, skills managed/native/perf/tracing/dumps/binary, netcoredbg CLI

plugins.name: dex-mr-reviewer
plugins.description: Языко-агностичное первичное ревью чужого MR/PR по рецепту Reviewer: карта изменений, параллельные фокусы, фальсификация находок, severity/confidence/scope, доставка инлайн-тредами через gh/glab.

plugins.name: dex-mr-check-reviewer
plugins.description: Итеративное ре-ревью дельты MR/PR с прошлого раунда: range-diff от LAST_REVIEW_SHA, статус прежних находок, новые находки только в дельте, обновление существующих тредов и публикация новых.

plugins.name: dex-review-planner
plugins.description: План правок по комментариям ревью без редактирования кода: сбор тредов и коммитов, классификация замечаний, верификация чтением кода, план P0..P3 с blast radius, черновики ответов в треды.

plugins.name: dex-feature-implementer
plugins.description: Реализация фичи по ТЗ до локальных коммитов без push: декомпозиция в R/I-требования, инвентаризация и переиспользование, дизайн контрактов и ошибок, edit-план P1..Pn, пошаговая правка с локальной верификацией и запретом недоделок.

plugins.name: dex-debugger
plugins.description: Language-agnostic root-cause debugger: reproduce, isolate, root cause, red-green test, hypothesis falsification. Stack-conditional skill loading.

plugins.name: dex-security-reviewer
plugins.description: Language-agnostic deep security analysis: threat model (actors/trust boundaries/assets), OWASP attack paths, exploit chains, severity by chain exploitability. Stack-conditional skill loading.

plugins.name: dex-self-reviewer
plugins.description: Pre-push саморевью своей локальной ветки включая незакоммиченные изменения: committed+staged+worktree diff, 7 фокусов с реальным прогоном build/test, фальсификация, чеклист правок до push.

plugins.name: dex-conflict-resolver
plugins.description: Подтягивание базовой ветки в фича-ветку и разрешение конфликтов merge/rebase без тихой потери стороны: превью без записи, карта по типам, охота за тихими конфликтами, сведение обоих намерений, фальсификация и финал без push.

plugins.name: dex-bundle-code-review
plugins.description: Bundle цикла работы с кодом: языко-агностичное ревью MR/PR, ре-ревью дельты, план правок, реализация фичи, интеграция базовой ветки с разрешением конфликтов и pre-push саморевью, плюс skills дисциплины ревью.
